regression_tests.description: Verify that malformed Info.plist files are detected and rejected
preconditions: Info.plist file is present but malformed
regression_tests.input: Path to app directory with empty/invalid Info.plist
regression_tests.expected_behavior_with_patch: Privacy audit returns passed=False with message 'Info.plist is malformed: Invalid file'
regression_tests.failure_behavior_without_patch: Privacy audit returns passed=True (false positive) because string matching on empty text succeeds
regression_tests.test_code:
async def test_privacy_audit_malformed_plist():
    tester = PreSubmissionTester()
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
        app_path = Path(tmpdir)
        (app_path / 'MyApp.xcodeproj').mkdir()
        (app_path / 'MyApp').mkdir()
        # Create empty Info.plist
        (app_path / 'MyApp' / 'Info.plist').write_text('')
        result = await tester._privacy_audit(app_path)
        assert result.passed is False
        assert 'malformed' in result.message

regression_tests.description: Verify that valid Info.plist with all privacy keys passes
preconditions: Info.plist file is valid XML with all required privacy keys
regression_tests.input: Path to app directory with valid Info.plist
regression_tests.failure_behavior_without_patch: Would also pass (no change in behavior for valid case)
regression_tests.test_code:
async def test_privacy_audit_valid_plist():
    tester = PreSubmissionTester()
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
        app_path = Path(tmpdir)
        (app_path / 'MyApp.xcodeproj').mkdir()
        (app_path / 'MyApp').mkdir()
        plist_data = {
            'NSCameraUsageDescription': 'Camera access',
            'NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription': 'Photo library',
        }
        with open(app_path / 'MyApp' / 'Info.plist', 'wb') as f:
            plistlib.dump(plist_data, f)
        # Create Swift file using camera
        (app_path / 'MyApp' / 'Camera.swift').write_text('import AVFoundation')
        result = await tester._privacy_audit(app_path)
        assert result.passed is True

regression_tests.description: Verify that non-UTF8 Swift files are skipped gracefully
preconditions: At least one Swift file has invalid UTF-8 encoding
regression_tests.input: Path to app directory with mixed-encoding Swift files
regression_tests.expected_behavior_with_patch: Crash test continues processing, reports unreadable files
regression_tests.test_code:
async def test_crash_test_mixed_encoding():
    tester = PreSubmissionTester()
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
        app_path = Path(tmpdir)
        (app_path / 'MyApp.xcodeproj').mkdir()
        (app_path / 'MyApp').mkdir()
        # Create valid Swift file
        (app_path / 'MyApp' / 'ValidView.swift').write_text('import SwiftUI')
        # Create invalid UTF-8 file
        with open(app_path / 'MyApp' / 'InvalidView.swift', 'wb') as f:
            f.write(b'\xff\xfe invalid utf-8')
        result = await tester._crash_test(app_path)
        assert 'Unreadable file' in result.details or result.passed is True

regression_tests.description: Verify that empty project names generate valid fallback names
preconditions: ProjectSpec with empty or whitespace-only name
regression_tests.expected_behavior_with_patch: Generates app name 'A fitness' from description
regression_tests.failure_behavior_without_patch: Generates empty app name, App Store rejection
regression_tests.test_code:
def test_generate_name_empty_project():
    generator = AppStoreAssetGenerator()
    project = ProjectSpec(name='', description='A fitness tracking app')
    name = generator._generate_name(project)
    assert len(name) >= generator.MIN_NAME_LENGTH
    assert name.strip() == name  # No leading/trailing whitespace

regression_tests.description: Verify that long project names are truncated correctly
preconditions: ProjectSpec with name longer than MAX_NAME_LENGTH
regression_tests.expected_behavior_with_patch: Truncates to 30 chars at word boundary
regression_tests.test_code:
def test_generate_name_truncation():
    generator = AppStoreAssetGenerator()
    project = ProjectSpec(name='A' * 100)
    name = generator._generate_name(project)
    assert len(name) <= generator.MAX_NAME_LENGTH

regression_tests.description: Verify that patched pre-submission tester works end-to-end
preconditions: Valid iOS app project with proper structure
regression_tests.input: Path to valid iOS app project
regression_tests.expected_behavior_with_patch: Full review completes, returns ReviewResult with all checks
regression_tests.failure_behavior_without_patch: May fail on encoding errors or malformed plist
regression_tests.test_code:
async def test_full_review_integration():
    tester = PreSubmissionTester()
    # Use existing temp_app_project fixture
    result = await tester.run_full_review(temp_app_project)
    assert isinstance(result, ReviewResult)
    assert len(result.checks) == 10
    # All checks should complete without exceptions
